                  <li className="flex items-start gap-3">
                    <div className="w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-blue-100 text-blue-600 flex items-center justify-center text-sm">
                      3
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <p className="font-medium text-gray-900">View Results</p>
                      <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Get detailed analysis with AI explanations</p>
                    </div>
                  </li>
                </ul>
              </div>

              <div className="bg-linear-to-br from-emerald-50 to-green-50 rounded-2xl p-6 border border-emerald-200">
                <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-emerald-900 mb-3">
                  🎯 Recommended Settings
                </h3>
                <div className="space-y-3">
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                    <span className="text-sm text-emerald-800">Beginners</span>
                    <span className="text-sm font-medium text-emerald-900">5-10 Questions • Easy</span>
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                    <span className="text-sm text-emerald-800">Intermediate</span>
                    <span className="text-sm font-medium text-emerald-900">10-15 Questions • Medium</span>
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                    <span className="text-sm text-emerald-800">Advanced</span>
                    <span className="text-sm font-medium text-emerald-900">15-20 Questions • Hard</span>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  /* ---------------- TOPIC CARDS VIEW ---------------- */
  return (
    <div className="p-4 md:p-6 min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="mb-8">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-600 mb-4">
          <Link to="/dashboard" className="hover:text-blue-600">
            Dashboard
          </Link>
          <span>→</span>
          <Link to="/aptitude" className="hover:text-blue-600">
            Aptitude
          </Link>
          <span>→</span>
          <span className="font-medium text-gray-900">Data Interpretation</span>
        </div>

        <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center justify-between">
          <div>
            <h1 className="text-2xl md:text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900">
              Data Interpretation
            </h1>
            <p className="text-gray-600 mt-2">
              Master data analysis skills with AI-generated personalized quizzes
            </p>
          </div>
          <div className="mt-4 md:mt-0">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
              <div className="text-center">
                <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-blue-600">🤖 AI</p>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Powered Quizzes</p>
              </div>
              <div className="text-center">
                <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-green-600"></p>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-600"></p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Difficulty Overview */}
        <div className="mt-6 flex flex-wrap gap-4">
          {difficultyLevels.map((level, index) => (
            <div key={index} className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <div className={`px-3 py-1 rounded-full ${level.color} text-sm font-medium`}>
                {level.level}
              </div>
              <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">{level.topics} topic(s)</span>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>

        {/* Analysis Tips */}
        <div className="mt-6 bg-linear-to-r from-green-50 to-emerald-50 rounded-xl p-4 border border-green-200">
          <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
            <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-lg bg-green-100 flex items-center justify-center shrink-0">
              <span className="text-green-600">💡</span>
            </div>
            <div>
              <h4 className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-1">DI Strategy</h4>
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                Always spend 1-2 minutes understanding the data structure before solving questions.
              </p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Topics Grid */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 mb-8">
        {topics.map((topic, index) => (
          <div
            key={index}
            onClick={() => {
              setSelectedSubject(topic.name);
              setSelectedSubtopic("");
              setView("form");
            }}
            className="group bg-white rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 p-6 hover:shadow-xl hover:border-blue-300 transition-all duration-300 cursor-pointer"
          >
            <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-4">
              <div className={`w-14 h-14 rounded-xl ${topic.color} flex items-center justify-center`}>
                <span className="text-2xl">{topic.icon}</span>
              </div>
              <div className="text-right">
                <span className={`text-xs px-3 py-1 rounded-full ${topic.difficulty === "Easy" ? "bg-green-100 text-green-800" :
                    topic.difficulty === "Medium" ? "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800" :
                      "bg-red-100 text-red-800"
                  }`}>
                  {topic.difficulty}
                </span>
                <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">{topic.timePerQuestion}</p>
              </div>
            </div>

            <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2 group-hover:text-blue-600">
              {topic.name}
            </h3>

            <div className="mb-4">
              <div className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-3">
                {topic.questions} questions
              </div>

              <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                {topic.subtopics.slice(0, 3).map((subtopic, idx) => (
                  <span key={idx} className="text-xs px-2 py-1 bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 rounded">
                    {subtopic}
                  </span>
                ))}
                {topic.subtopics.length > 3 && (
                  <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">
                    +{topic.subtopics.length - 3} more
                  </span>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="flex items-center justify-between pt-4 border-t border-gray-100">
              <span className="text-sm font-medium text-blue-600">
                Start AI Quiz →
              </span>
              <div className="text-xs text-gray-500">AI-generated</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* Analysis Tips Grid */}
      <div className="mb-8">
        <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">📊 Data Analysis Tips</h3>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-5 gap-4">
          {analysisTips.map((tip, index) => (
            <div
              key={index}
              className="bg-white rounded-xl p-4 border border-gray-200 hover:shadow-md cursor-pointer"
              onClick={() => {
                setSelectedSubject("Tables");
                setSelectedSubtopic("");
                setView("form");
              }}
            >
              <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-lg bg-green-100 flex items-center justify-center mb-3">
                <span className="text-green-600">✓</span>
              </div>
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-700">{tip}</p>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* AI Quiz Banner */}
      <div className="bg-linear-to-r from-purple-600 to-indigo-600 rounded-2xl p-6 mb-8 text-white">
        <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row items-center justify-between">
          <div className="mb-4 md:mb-0">
            <h3 className="text-xl font-bold mb-2">🤖 Try AI-Powered DI Quiz</h3>
            <p className="text-purple-100">
              Get detailed results with AI explanations after completing data interpretation quizzes
            </p>
          </div>
          <button
            onClick={() => {
              setSelectedSubject("Mixed Graphs");
              setSelectedSubtopic("");
              setView("form");
            }}
            className="bg-white text-purple-600 px-6 py-3 rounded-xl font-bold hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors"
          >
            Start Adaptive Quiz
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Calculator Skills */}
      <div className="bg-linear-to-r from-blue-50 to-indigo-50 rounded-2xl p-6 mb-8">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
          <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">🧮 Calculator Tips</h3>
          <button
            onClick={() => {
              setSelectedSubject("Tables");
              setSelectedSubtopic("Percentage Calculation");
              setView("form");
            }}
            className="text-sm font-medium text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-800"
          >
            Learn Shortcuts
          </button>
        </div>

        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
          <div className="bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-xl p-4 hover:shadow-md cursor-pointer"
            onClick={() => {
              setSelectedSubject("Tables");
              setSelectedSubtopic("Percentage Calculation");
              setView("form");
            }}>
            <h4 className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2">Percentage</h4>
            <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">x% of y = (x/100) × y</p>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-xl p-4 hover:shadow-md cursor-pointer"
            onClick={() => {
              setSelectedSubject("Tables");
              setSelectedSubtopic("Ratio Analysis");
              setView("form");
            }}>
            <h4 className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2">Ratio</h4>
            <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">a:b = a/(a+b)</p>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-xl p-4 hover:shadow-md cursor-pointer"
            onClick={() => {
              setSelectedSubject("Tables");
              setSelectedSubtopic("Comparison");
              setView("form");
            }}>
            <h4 className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2">Average</h4>
            <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Avg = Sum/n</p>

              setView("form");

// GeneralKnowledge.jsx
import { useState } from "react";
import { Link, useNavigate } from "react-router-dom";
import QuizConfigForm from "../../Componenets/forms/QuizConfigForm";
import axios from "../../api/axiosInstance";
// Mock AI API call to generate quiz questions for GK topics


export default function GeneralKnowledge() {

  const indexToOption = (i) => {
    if (i === 0) return "A";
    if (i === 1) return "B";
    if (i === 2) return "C";
    if (i === 3) return "D";
    return null;
  };
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const [view, setView] = useState("cards");
  const [selectedSubject, setSelectedSubject] = useState(null);
  const [selectedSubtopic, setSelectedSubtopic] = useState("");
  const [quizData, setQuizData] = useState(null);
  const [currentQuestionIndex, setCurrentQuestionIndex] = useState(0);
  const [selectedOption, setSelectedOption] = useState(null);
  const [isGeneratingQuiz, setIsGeneratingQuiz] = useState(false);
  const [isLoadingNextQuestion, setIsLoadingNextQuestion] = useState(false);
  const [userAnswers, setUserAnswers] = useState([]);
  const [skippedQuestions, setSkippedQuestions] = useState([]);

  const topics = [
    {
      name: "History",
      questions: "AI-Based",
      difficulty: "Medium",
      color: "bg-blue-100",
      icon: "🏛️",
      subtopics: ["Ancient", "Medieval", "Modern", "World History", "Indian History", "Freedom Struggle"],
      updateFrequency: "Static"
    },
    {
      name: "Geography",
      questions: "AI-Based",
      difficulty: "Easy",
      color: "bg-green-100",
      icon: "🌍",
      subtopics: ["Physical", "Indian", "World", "Climate", "Resources", "Economic Geography"],
      updateFrequency: "Static"
    },
    {
      name: "Polity",
      questions: "AI-Based",
      difficulty: "Medium",
      color: "bg-purple-100",
      icon: "⚖️",
      subtopics: ["Constitution", "Parliament", "Judiciary", "Executive", "Local Government", "Fundamental Rights"],
      updateFrequency: "Occasional"
    },
    {
      name: "Economy",
      questions: "AI-Based",
      difficulty: "Hard",
      color: "bg-red-100",
      icon: "💰",
      subtopics: ["Basic Concepts", "Indian Economy", "Budget", "Banking", "Finance", "Economic Terms"],
      updateFrequency: "Monthly"
    },
    {
      name: "Science",
      questions: "AI-Based",
      difficulty: "Medium",
      color: "bg-yellow-100",
      icon: "🔬",
      subtopics: ["Physics", "Chemistry", "Biology", "Technology", "Space", "Discoveries"],
      updateFrequency: "Weekly"
    },
    {
      name: "Current Affairs",
      questions: "AI-Based",
      difficulty: "Medium",
      color: "bg-indigo-100",
      icon: "📰",
      subtopics: ["National", "International", "Sports", "Awards", "Summits", "Important Days"],
      updateFrequency: "Daily"
    }
  ];

  const difficultyLevels = [
    { level: "Easy", color: "bg-green-100 text-green-800", topics: 1 },
    { level: "Medium", color: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800", topics: 4 },
    { level: "Hard", color: "bg-red-100 text-red-800", topics: 1 }
  ];

  const currentAffairsCategories = [
    { name: "National News", color: "bg-red-100", count: "AI" },
    { name: "International", color: "bg-blue-100", count: "AI" },
    { name: "Sports", color: "bg-green-100", count: "AI" },
    { name: "Business", color: "bg-yellow-100", count: "AI" },
    { name: "Science & Tech", color: "bg-purple-100", count: "AI" },
  ];

  const handleStartQuiz = async (config) => {
    setIsGeneratingQuiz(true);

    try {
      const res = await axios.post("/quiz/generate", {
        category: "APTITUDE",
        branch: "GENERAL_KNOWLEDGE",
        subject: selectedSubject,
        unit: selectedSubtopic || "General",
        difficulty: config.difficulty,
        totalQuestions: config.numberOfQuestions
      });

      const aiQuestions = res.data;

      const formattedQuiz = {
        topic: selectedSubject,
        subtopic: selectedSubtopic || "All Subtopics",
        difficulty: config.difficulty,
        timePerQuestion: "2 min",
        totalQuestions: aiQuestions.length,
        questions: aiQuestions.map((q) => ({
          id: q.id,                 // backend ID
          question: q.question,
          options: q.options,

          // IMPORTANT:
          // Do NOT compute correctAnswer on frontend anymore
          correctAnswer: null,

          explanation: "",
          aiTip: "",
          learningObjective: ""
        }))

      };


      setQuizData(formattedQuiz);
      setUserAnswers(new Array(aiQuestions.length).fill(null));
      setSkippedQuestions([]);
      setView("quiz");

    } catch (err) {
      console.error(err);
      alert("Failed to generate quiz");
    } finally {
      setIsGeneratingQuiz(false);
    }
  };


  const handleNextQuestion = () => {
    const updatedAnswers = [...userAnswers];
    updatedAnswers[currentQuestionIndex] = selectedOption;
    setUserAnswers(updatedAnswers);

    setIsLoadingNextQuestion(true);

    setTimeout(async () => {
      if (currentQuestionIndex + 1 < quizData.questions.length) {
        setCurrentQuestionIndex(currentQuestionIndex + 1);
        setSelectedOption(userAnswers[currentQuestionIndex + 1]);
      } else {
        const finalAnswers = [...updatedAnswers];
        if (selectedOption !== null && finalAnswers[currentQuestionIndex] === null) {
          finalAnswers[currentQuestionIndex] = selectedOption;
        }


        //submmit

        const res = await axios.post("/quiz/submit", {

          category: "APTITUDE",
          branch: "GENERAL_KNOWLEDGE",
          subject: selectedSubject,
          unit: selectedSubtopic || "General",
          subtopic: selectedSubtopic || null,
          difficulty: quizData.difficulty,
          mode: "practice",
          timeTaken: null,

          answers: finalAnswers
            .map((ans, index) => ({
              questionId: quizData.questions[index].id,
              selectedOption: indexToOption(ans)
            }))


        });

        navigate(`/engineering/result/${res.data.attemptId}`);


      }
      setIsLoadingNextQuestion(false);
    }, 500);
  };

  const handleSkipQuestion = () => {


    const updatedAnswers = [...userAnswers];
    updatedAnswers[currentQuestionIndex] = null;
    setUserAnswers(updatedAnswers);
    setSkippedQuestions(prev => [...prev, currentQuestionIndex]);

    setIsLoadingNextQuestion(true);

    setTimeout(async () => {
      console.log("INDEX:", currentQuestionIndex, "TOTAL:", quizData.questions.length);

      if (currentQuestionIndex + 1 < quizData.questions.length) {
        setCurrentQuestionIndex(currentQuestionIndex + 1);
        setSelectedOption(userAnswers[currentQuestionIndex + 1]);
      } else {
        const formattedAnswers = updatedAnswers.map((ans, index) => ({
          questionId: quizData.questions[index].id,
          selectedOption: indexToOption(ans)
        }));

        const res = await axios.post("/quiz/submit", {
          category: "APTITUDE",
          branch: "GENERAL_KNOWLEDGE",
          subject: selectedSubject,
          unit: selectedSubtopic || "General",
          subtopic: selectedSubtopic || null,
          difficulty: quizData.difficulty,
          mode: "practice",
          timeTaken: null,
          answers: formattedAnswers
        });

        navigate(`/engineering/result/${res.data.attemptId}`);

      }


      setIsLoadingNextQuestion(false);
    }, 500);
  };


  const handleOptionSelect = (optionIndex) => {
    setSelectedOption(optionIndex);
    const updatedAnswers = [...userAnswers];
    updatedAnswers[currentQuestionIndex] = optionIndex;
    setUserAnswers(updatedAnswers);
  };

  const currentQuestion = quizData?.questions[currentQuestionIndex];

  /* ---------------- QUIZ VIEW ---------------- */
  if (view === "quiz" && quizData) {
    return (
      <div className="p-4 md:p-6 min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-600 mb-6">
          <button
            onClick={() => {
              if (window.confirm("Are you sure you want to leave? Your progress will be lost.")) {
                setView("cards");
                setQuizData(null);
                setCurrentQuestionIndex(0);
                setSelectedOption(null);
                setUserAnswers([]);
                setSelectedSubtopic("");
                setSkippedQuestions([]);
              }
            }}
            className="hover:text-blue-600 flex items-center gap-1"
          >
            <svg className="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
              <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M10 19l-7-7m0 0l7-7m-7 7h18" />
            </svg>
            Back to Topics
          </button>
          <span>→</span>
          <span className="font-medium text-gray-900">AI GK Quiz</span>
        </div>

        <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto">
          <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 p-6 mb-6">
            <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center justify-between gap-4">
              <div>
                <h1 className="text-2xl md:text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">
                  {quizData.topic} Practice
                </h1>
                <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 text-sm text-gray-600">
                  <span className="px-3 py-1 bg-blue-100 text-blue-800 rounded-full">
                    {quizData.subtopic}
                  </span>
                  <span className="px-3 py-1 bg-green-100 text-green-800 rounded-full">
                    {quizData.difficulty}
                  </span>
                  <span className="px-3 py-1 bg-purple-100 text-purple-800 rounded-full">
                    Question {currentQuestionIndex + 1} of {quizData.totalQuestions}
                  </span>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="text-right">
                <div className="text-lg font-bold text-blue-600">
                  ⚡ AI-Powered
                </div>
                <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                  Real-time generated GK questions
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 p-6 mb-6 relative min-h-100">
            {isLoadingNextQuestion ? (
              <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-white bg-opacity-90 flex flex-col items-center justify-center rounded-2xl">
                <div className="w-16 h-16 border-4 border-blue-600 border-t-transparent rounded-full animate-spin mb-4"></div>
                <p className="text-gray-600">Loading next question...</p>
              </div>
            ) : currentQuestion ? (
              <div className="mb-8">
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <div className="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg bg-blue-100 text-blue-600 flex items-center justify-center">
                      Q{currentQuestionIndex + 1}
                    </div>
                    <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">
                      {quizData.timePerQuestion} suggested
                    </span>
                  </div>
                  <div className="text-sm text-gray-500">
                    {currentQuestionIndex + 1} / {quizData.totalQuestions}
                  </div>
                </div>

                <div className="text-lg font-medium text-gray-900 mb-8">
                  {currentQuestion.question}
                </div>

                <div className="space-y-3 mb-8">
                  {currentQuestion.options?.map((option, idx) => (
                    <div
                      key={idx}
                      onClick={() =>
                        !isLoadingNextQuestion && handleOptionSelect(idx)
                      }
                      className={`p-4 rounded-xl border cursor-pointer transition-all ${selectedOption === idx
                        ? "border-blue-500 bg-blue-50"
                        : "border-gray-200 hover:border-gray-300"
                        } ${isLoadingNextQuestion
                          ? "cursor-default"
                          : "hover:bg-gray-50"
                        }`}
                    >
                      <div className="flex items-center">
                        <div
                          className={`w-10 h-10 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center mr-4 ${selectedOption === idx
                            ? "bg-blue-500 text-white"
                            : "bg-gray-100 text-gray-600"
                            }`}
                        >
                          {String.fromCharCode(65 + idx)}
                        </div>
                        <div className="text-gray-800">{option}</div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="text-center py-10 text-gray-500">
                No questions available.
              </div>
            )}
          </div>


          <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-4 justify-between items-center">
            <button
              onClick={handleSkipQuestion}
              disabled={isLoadingNextQuestion}
              className={`w-full sm:w-auto px-6 py-3 rounded-lg font-medium flex items-center justify-center gap-2 ${isLoadingNextQuestion
                ? 'bg-gray-200 text-gray-500 cursor-not-allowed'
                : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-200'
                }`}
            >
              <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M9 5l7 7-7 7" />
              </svg>
              Skip Question
            </button>

            <button
              onClick={handleNextQuestion}
              disabled={isLoadingNextQuestion}
              className={`w-full sm:w-auto px-8 py-3 rounded-lg font-medium ${isLoadingNextQuestion
                ? 'bg-gray-300 text-gray-500 cursor-not-allowed'
                : 'bg-blue-600 text-white hover:bg-blue-700'
                }`}
            >
              {currentQuestionIndex === quizData.questions.length - 1
                ? 'Complete Quiz & See Results'
                : 'Next Question →'}
            </button>
          </div>

          <div className="bg-linear-to-r from-purple-50 to-pink-50 rounded-2xl p-6 border border-purple-200 mt-8">
            <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
              <div className="w-12 h-12 rounded-xl bg-linear-to-r from-purple-500 to-pink-500 flex items-center justify-center">
                <span className="text-xl text-white">🤖</span>
              </div>
              <div>
                <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2">AI-Generated GK Quiz</h3>
                <p className="text-gray-600 mb-3">
                  This quiz is dynamically generated by AI based on your selected topic and difficulty level.
                </p>
                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 gap-3">
                  <div className="bg-white/70 rounded-lg p-3">
                    <p className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-900">Progress</p>
                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">{currentQuestionIndex + 1}/{quizData.totalQuestions}</p>
                  </div>
                  <div className="bg-white/70 rounded-lg p-3">
                    <p className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-900">Answered</p>
                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">{userAnswers.filter(a => a !== null).length} questions</p>
                  </div>
                  <div className="bg-white/70 rounded-lg p-3">
                    <p className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-900">Skipped</p>
                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">{userAnswers.filter(a => a === null).length} questions</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  /* ---------------- FORM VIEW ---------------- */
  if (view === "form") {
    const selectedTopicObj = topics.find(topic => topic.name === selectedSubject);

    return (
      <div className="p-4 md:p-6 min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-600 mb-6">
          <button
            onClick={() => {
              setView("cards");
              setSelectedSubtopic("");
            }}
            className="hover:text-blue-600 flex items-center gap-1"
          >
            <svg className="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
              <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M10 19l-7-7m0 0l7-7m-7 7h18" />
            </svg>
            Back to Topics
          </button>
          <span>→</span>
          <span className="font-medium text-gray-900">Configure AI GK Quiz</span>
        </div>

        <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto">
          <div className="bg-linear-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 rounded-2xl p-6 text-white mb-6">
            <h1 className="text-2xl md:text-3xl font-bold mb-2">
              Configure AI Quiz for {selectedSubject}
            </h1>
            <p className="text-blue-100">
              Let our AI generate personalized general knowledge questions based on your preferences
            </p>
          </div>

          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
            <div className="lg:col-span-2">
              <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 p-6">
                {isGeneratingQuiz ? (
                  <div className="text-center py-12">
                    <div className="inline-block animate-spin rounded-full h-16 w-16 border-4 border-blue-600 border-t-transparent mb-4"></div>
                    <h3 className="text-xl font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2">AI is Generating Your Quiz</h3>
                    <p className="text-gray-600">
                      Creating personalized GK questions based on your configuration...
                    </p>
                  </div>
                ) : (
                  <>
                    {selectedTopicObj && selectedTopicObj.subtopics.length > 0 && (
                      <div className="mb-6">
                        <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-3">
                          Select Specific Subtopic (Optional)
                        </label>
                        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 gap-3">
                          <div
                            onClick={() => setSelectedSubtopic("")}
                            className={`p-4 rounded-xl border cursor-pointer transition-all ${selectedSubtopic === ""
                              ? "border-blue-500 bg-blue-50"
                              : "border-gray-200 hover:border-gray-300"
                              }`}
                          >
                            <div className="font-medium text-gray-900">All Subtopics</div>
                            <div className="text-sm text-gray-600 mt-1">Comprehensive practice</div>
                          </div>
                          {selectedTopicObj.subtopics.map((subtopic, idx) => (
                            <div
                              key={idx}
                              onClick={() => setSelectedSubtopic(subtopic)}
                              className={`p-4 rounded-xl border cursor-pointer transition-all ${selectedSubtopic === subtopic
                                ? "border-blue-500 bg-blue-50"
                                : "border-gray-200 hover:border-gray-300"
                                }`}
                            >
                              <div className="font-medium text-gray-900">{subtopic}</div>
                              <div className="text-sm text-gray-600 mt-1">Focused practice</div>
                            </div>
                          ))}
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    )}

                    <QuizConfigForm
                      context={{
                        category: "aptitude",
                        subject: "gk",
                        topic: selectedSubject,
                        subtopic: selectedSubtopic,
                      }}
                      onStart={handleStartQuiz}
                    />
                  </>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="space-y-6">
              <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 p-6">
                <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                  <span className="text-blue-600">📚</span> How AI GK Quiz Works
                </h3>
                <ul className="space-y-3">
                  <li className="flex items-start gap-3">
                    <div className="w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-blue-100 text-blue-600 flex items-center justify-center text-sm">
                      1
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <p className="font-medium text-gray-900">Configure Preferences</p>
                      <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Set topic, difficulty, and question count</p>
                    </div>
                  </li>
                  <li className="flex items-start gap-3">
                    <div className="w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-blue-100 text-blue-600 flex items-center justify-center text-sm">
                      2
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <p className="font-medium text-gray-900">Take the Quiz</p>
                      <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Answer GK questions</p>
                    </div>
                  </li>
                  <li className="flex items-start gap-3">
                    <div className="w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-blue-100 text-blue-600 flex items-center justify-center text-sm">
                      3
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <p className="font-medium text-gray-900">View Results</p>
                      <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Get detailed analysis with AI explanations</p>
                    </div>
                  </li>
                </ul>
              </div>

              <div className="bg-linear-to-br from-emerald-50 to-green-50 rounded-2xl p-6 border border-emerald-200">
                <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-emerald-900 mb-3">
                  🎯 Recommended Settings
                </h3>
                <div className="space-y-3">
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                    <span className="text-sm text-emerald-800">Beginners</span>
                    <span className="text-sm font-medium text-emerald-900">5-10 Questions • Easy</span>
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                    <span className="text-sm text-emerald-800">Intermediate</span>
                    <span className="text-sm font-medium text-emerald-900">10-15 Questions • Medium</span>
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                    <span className="text-sm text-emerald-800">Advanced</span>
                    <span className="text-sm font-medium text-emerald-900">15-20 Questions • Hard</span>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  /* ---------------- TOPIC CARDS VIEW ---------------- */

    <div className="p-4 md:p-6 min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
      <div className="mb-8">

            Dashboard
          </Link>
          <span>→</span>
          <Link to="/aptitude" className="hover:text-blue-600">

          </Link>
          <span>→</span>
          <span className="font-medium text-gray-900">General Knowledge</span>
        </div>

        <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center justify-between">
          <div>
            <h1 className="text-2xl md:text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900">
              General Knowledge
            </h1>
            <p className="text-gray-600 mt-2">
              Comprehensive GK with AI-generated personalized quizzes
            </p>
          </div>
          <div className="mt-4 md:mt-0">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
              <div className="text-center">
                <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-blue-600">🤖 AI</p>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Powered Quizzes</p>
              </div>
              <div className="text-center">
                <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-green-600"></p>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-600"></p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="mt-6 flex flex-wrap gap-4">
          {difficultyLevels.map((level, index) => (
            <div key={index} className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <div className={`px-3 py-1 rounded-full ${level.color} text-sm font-medium`}>
                {level.level}
              </div>
              <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">{level.topics} topic(s)</span>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>

        <div className="mt-6 bg-linear-to-r from-yellow-50 to-orange-50 rounded-xl p-4 border border-yellow-200">
          <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
            <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-lg bg-yellow-100 flex items-center justify-center shrink-0">
              <span className="text-yellow-600">📰</span>
            </div>
            <div>
              <h4 className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-1">Daily Current Affairs</h4>
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                Updated daily with latest national & international news. Practice today's quiz!
              </p>
            </div>
            <button
              onClick={() => {
                setSelectedSubject("Current Affairs");
                setSelectedSubtopic("");
                setView("form");
              }}
              className="ml-auto px-4 py-2 bg-yellow-500 text-white text-sm font-medium rounded-lg hover:bg-yellow-600"
            >
              Today's Quiz
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="mb-8">
        <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">📰 Current Affairs Categories</h3>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-5 gap-4">
          {currentAffairsCategories.map((category, index) => (
            <div
              key={index}
              className="bg-white rounded-xl p-4 border border-gray-200 text-center hover:shadow-md cursor-pointer"
              onClick={() => {
                setSelectedSubject("Current Affairs");
                setSelectedSubtopic(category.name);
                setView("form");
              }}
            >
              <div className={`w-12 h-12 ${category.color} rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center mb-3 mx-auto`}>
                <span className="text-lg">
                  {category.name.includes("National") ? "🇮🇳" :
                    category.name.includes("International") ? "🌐" :
                      category.name.includes("Sports") ? "⚽" :
                        category.name.includes("Business") ? "💼" : "🔬"}
                </span>
              </div>
              <h4 className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-1">{category.name}</h4>
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">{category.count} questions</p>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 mb-8">
        {topics.map((topic, index) => (
          <div
            key={index}
            onClick={() => {
              setSelectedSubject(topic.name);
              setSelectedSubtopic("");
              setView("form");
            }}
            className="group bg-white rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 p-6 hover:shadow-xl hover:border-blue-300 transition-all duration-300 cursor-pointer"
          >
            <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-4">
              <div className={`w-14 h-14 rounded-xl ${topic.color} flex items-center justify-center`}>
                <span className="text-2xl">{topic.icon}</span>
              </div>
              <div className="text-right">
                <span className={`text-xs px-3 py-1 rounded-full ${topic.difficulty === "Easy" ? "bg-green-100 text-green-800" :

                    "bg-red-100 text-red-800"
                  }`}>
                  {topic.difficulty}
                </span>
                <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">{topic.updateFrequency}</p>
              </div>

              {topic.name}
            </h3>

            <div className="mb-4">
              <div className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-3">
                {topic.questions} questions
              </div>

                {topic.subtopics.slice(0, 3).map((subtopic, idx) => (
                  <span key={idx} className="text-xs px-2 py-1 bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 rounded">
                    {subtopic}
                  </span>
                ))}
                {topic.subtopics.length > 3 && (
                  <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">
                    +{topic.subtopics.length - 3} more
                  </span>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>

              <span className="text-sm font-medium text-blue-600">
                Start AI Quiz →
              </span>
              <div className="text-xs text-gray-500">AI-generated</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>

      <div className="bg-linear-to-r from-blue-50 to-indigo-50 rounded-2xl p-6 mb-8">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
          <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">📅 Monthly Updates</h3>
          <button
            onClick={() => {
              setSelectedSubject("Current Affairs");

              setView("form");

            onClick={() => {
              setSelectedSubject("Current Affairs");
              setSelectedSubtopic("Awards");
              setView("form");

            <h4 className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2">This Month's Awards</h4>

            <span className="inline-block mt-2 text-xs px-2 py-1 bg-blue-100 text-blue-800 rounded">15+ items</span>

              setSelectedSubject("Polity");
              setSelectedSubtopic("Government Schemes");
              setView("form");
            }}
          >
            <h4 className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2">Government Schemes</h4>

          </div>

      </div>

          <div className="mb-4 md:mb-0">
            <h3 className="text-xl font-bold mb-2">🤖 Try AI-Powered GK Quiz</h3>
            <p className="text-purple-100">
              Get detailed results with AI explanations after completing general knowledge quizzes
            </p>
          </div>
          <button
            onClick={() => {
              setSelectedSubject("Current Affairs");
              setSelectedSubtopic("");
              setView("form");
            }}
            className="bg-white text-purple-600 px-6 py-3 rounded-xl font-bold hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors"
          >
            Start Adaptive Quiz
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <Link
          to="/aptitude"
          className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 text-gray-700 bg-gray-100 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-200 transition-colors"
        >
          <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
            <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M10 19l-7-7m0 0l7-7m-7 7h18" />
          </svg>
          Back to Aptitude
        </Link>

        <div className="flex gap-4">
          <Link
            to="/aptitude/di"
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 text-gray-600 bg-gray-100 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-200 transition-colors"
          >
            <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
              <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M10 19l-7-7m0 0l7-7m-7 7h18" />
            </svg>
            Previous: DI
          </Link>

          <Link
            to="/aptitude/computer"
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 text-blue-600 bg-blue-50 rounded-lg hover:bg-blue-100 transition-colors"
          >
            Next: Computer Aptitude
            <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">

            </svg>

        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );

// LogicalReasoning.jsx
import { useState } from "react";
import { Link, useNavigate } from "react-router-dom";
import QuizConfigForm from "../../Componenets/forms/QuizConfigForm";
import axios from "../../api/axiosInstance";

// Mock AI API call to generate quiz questions for Logical Reasoning topics


export default function LogicalReasoning() {

  const indexToOption = (i) => {
    if (i === 0) return "A";
    if (i === 1) return "B";
    if (i === 2) return "C";
    if (i === 3) return "D";
    return null;
  };
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const [view, setView] = useState("cards");
  const [selectedSubject, setSelectedSubject] = useState(null);
  const [selectedSubtopic, setSelectedSubtopic] = useState("");
  const [quizData, setQuizData] = useState(null);
  const [currentQuestionIndex, setCurrentQuestionIndex] = useState(0);
  const [selectedOption, setSelectedOption] = useState(null);
  const [isGeneratingQuiz, setIsGeneratingQuiz] = useState(false);
  const [isLoadingNextQuestion, setIsLoadingNextQuestion] = useState(false);
  const [userAnswers, setUserAnswers] = useState([]);
  const [skippedQuestions, setSkippedQuestions] = useState([]);

  const topics = [
    {
      name: "Puzzles",
      questions: "AI-Based",
      difficulty: "Hard",
      color: "bg-blue-100",
      icon: "🧩",
      subtopics: ["Linear Arrangement", "Circular Arrangement", "Distribution", "Scheduling", "Blood Relations", "Direction Sense"],
      timePerQuestion: "2-3 mins"
    },
    {
      name: "Syllogisms",
      questions: "AI-Based",
      difficulty: "Easy",
      color: "bg-green-100",
      icon: "🔀",
      subtopics: ["Two Statements", "Three Statements", "Either-Or", "Complementary", "Possibility Cases", "Conclusions"],
      timePerQuestion: "30-45 secs"
    },
    {
      name: "Coding-Decoding",
      questions: "AI-Based",
      difficulty: "Medium",
      color: "bg-purple-100",
      icon: "🔐",
      subtopics: ["Letter Coding", "Number Coding", "Symbol Coding", "Mixed Coding", "Substitution", "Pattern Coding"],
      timePerQuestion: "1-2 mins"
    },
    {
      name: "Series & Patterns",
      questions: "AI-Based",
      difficulty: "Medium",
      color: "bg-red-100",
      icon: "📈",
      subtopics: ["Number Series", "Letter Series", "Alphanumeric", "Missing Terms", "Wrong Terms", "Pattern Identification"],
      timePerQuestion: "1 min"
    },
    {
      name: "Logical Deduction",
      questions: "AI-Based",
      difficulty: "Hard",
      color: "bg-yellow-100",
      icon: "💭",
      subtopics: ["Statements & Arguments", "Statements & Assumptions", "Course of Action", "Cause & Effect", "Inferences", "Conclusions"],
      timePerQuestion: "2-3 mins"
    },
    {
      name: "Analytical Reasoning",
      questions: "AI-Based",
      difficulty: "Hard",
      color: "bg-indigo-100",
      icon: "🔍",
      subtopics: ["Verbal Reasoning", "Non-Verbal", "Seating Arrangement", "Ranking", "Comparison", "Data Sufficiency"],
      timePerQuestion: "3-4 mins"
    }
  ];

  const difficultyLevels = [
    { level: "Easy", color: "bg-green-100 text-green-800", topics: 1 },
    { level: "Medium", color: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800", topics: 2 },
    { level: "Hard", color: "bg-red-100 text-red-800", topics: 3 }
  ];

  const handleStartQuiz = async (config) => {
    setIsGeneratingQuiz(true);

    try {
      const res = await axios.post("/quiz/generate", {
        category: "APTITUDE",
        branch: "LOGICAL_REASONING",
        subject: selectedSubject,
        unit: selectedSubtopic || "General",
        difficulty: config.difficulty,
        totalQuestions: config.numberOfQuestions
      });

      const aiQuestions = res.data;

      const formattedQuiz = {
        topic: selectedSubject,
        subtopic: selectedSubtopic || "All Subtopics",
        difficulty: config.difficulty,
        timePerQuestion: "2 min",
        totalQuestions: aiQuestions.length,
        questions: aiQuestions.map((q) => ({
          id: q.id,                 // backend ID
          question: q.question,
          options: q.options,

          // IMPORTANT:
          // Do NOT compute correctAnswer on frontend anymore
          correctAnswer: null,

          explanation: "",
          aiTip: "",
          learningObjective: ""
        }))

      };


      setQuizData(formattedQuiz);
      setUserAnswers(new Array(aiQuestions.length).fill(null));
      setSkippedQuestions([]);
      setView("quiz");

    } catch (err) {
      console.error(err);
      alert("Failed to generate quiz");
    } finally {
      setIsGeneratingQuiz(false);
    }
  };


  const handleNextQuestion = () => {
    const updatedAnswers = [...userAnswers];
    updatedAnswers[currentQuestionIndex] = selectedOption;
    setUserAnswers(updatedAnswers);

    setIsLoadingNextQuestion(true);

    setTimeout(async () => {
      if (currentQuestionIndex + 1 < quizData.questions.length) {
        setCurrentQuestionIndex(currentQuestionIndex + 1);
        setSelectedOption(userAnswers[currentQuestionIndex + 1]);
      } else {
        const finalAnswers = [...updatedAnswers];
        if (selectedOption !== null && finalAnswers[currentQuestionIndex] === null) {
          finalAnswers[currentQuestionIndex] = selectedOption;
        }


        //submmit

        const res = await axios.post("/quiz/submit", {

          category: "APTITUDE",
          branch: "LOGICAL_REASONING",
          subject: selectedSubject,
          unit: selectedSubtopic || "General",
          subtopic: selectedSubtopic || null,
          difficulty: quizData.difficulty,
          mode: "practice",
          timeTaken: null,

          answers: finalAnswers
            .map((ans, index) => ({
              questionId: quizData.questions[index].id,
              selectedOption: indexToOption(ans)
            }))


        });

        navigate(`/engineering/result/${res.data.attemptId}`);


      }
      setIsLoadingNextQuestion(false);
    }, 500);
  };

  const handleSkipQuestion = () => {


    const updatedAnswers = [...userAnswers];
    updatedAnswers[currentQuestionIndex] = null;
    setUserAnswers(updatedAnswers);
    setSkippedQuestions(prev => [...prev, currentQuestionIndex]);

    setIsLoadingNextQuestion(true);

    setTimeout(async () => {
      console.log("INDEX:", currentQuestionIndex, "TOTAL:", quizData.questions.length);

      if (currentQuestionIndex + 1 < quizData.questions.length) {
        setCurrentQuestionIndex(currentQuestionIndex + 1);
        setSelectedOption(userAnswers[currentQuestionIndex + 1]);
      } else {
        const formattedAnswers = updatedAnswers.map((ans, index) => ({
          questionId: quizData.questions[index].id,
          selectedOption: indexToOption(ans)
        }));

        const res = await axios.post("/quiz/submit", {
          category: "APTITUDE",
          branch: "LOGICAL_REASONING",
          subject: selectedSubject,
          unit: selectedSubtopic || "General",
          subtopic: selectedSubtopic || null,
          difficulty: quizData.difficulty,
          mode: "practice",
          timeTaken: null,
          answers: formattedAnswers
        });

        navigate(`/engineering/result/${res.data.attemptId}`);

      }


      setIsLoadingNextQuestion(false);
    }, 500);
  };


  const handleOptionSelect = (optionIndex) => {
    setSelectedOption(optionIndex);
    const updatedAnswers = [...userAnswers];
    updatedAnswers[currentQuestionIndex] = optionIndex;
    setUserAnswers(updatedAnswers);
  };

  const currentQuestion = quizData?.questions[currentQuestionIndex];

  /* ---------------- QUIZ VIEW ---------------- */
  if (view === "quiz" && quizData) {
    return (
      <div className="p-4 md:p-6 min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-600 mb-6">
          <button
            onClick={() => {
              if (window.confirm("Are you sure you want to leave? Your progress will be lost.")) {
                setView("cards");
                setQuizData(null);
                setCurrentQuestionIndex(0);
                setSelectedOption(null);
                setUserAnswers([]);
                setSelectedSubtopic("");
                setSkippedQuestions([]);
              }
            }}
            className="hover:text-blue-600 flex items-center gap-1"
          >
            <svg className="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
              <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M10 19l-7-7m0 0l7-7m-7 7h18" />
            </svg>
            Back to Topics
          </button>
          <span>→</span>
          <span className="font-medium text-gray-900">AI Logical Quiz</span>
        </div>

        <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto">
          <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 p-6 mb-6">
            <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center justify-between gap-4">
              <div>
                <h1 className="text-2xl md:text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">
                  {quizData.topic} Practice
                </h1>
                <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 text-sm text-gray-600">
                  <span className="px-3 py-1 bg-blue-100 text-blue-800 rounded-full">
                    {quizData.subtopic}
                  </span>
                  <span className="px-3 py-1 bg-green-100 text-green-800 rounded-full">
                    {quizData.difficulty}
                  </span>
                  <span className="px-3 py-1 bg-purple-100 text-purple-800 rounded-full">
                    Question {currentQuestionIndex + 1} of {quizData.totalQuestions}
                  </span>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="text-right">
                <div className="text-lg font-bold text-blue-600">
                  ⚡ AI-Powered
                </div>
                <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                  Real-time generated logical reasoning questions
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 p-6 mb-6 relative min-h-100">
            {isLoadingNextQuestion ? (
              <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-white bg-opacity-90 flex flex-col items-center justify-center rounded-2xl">
                <div className="w-16 h-16 border-4 border-blue-600 border-t-transparent rounded-full animate-spin mb-4"></div>
                <p className="text-gray-600">Loading next question...</p>
              </div>
            ) : currentQuestion ? (
              <div className="mb-8">
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <div className="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg bg-blue-100 text-blue-600 flex items-center justify-center">
                      Q{currentQuestionIndex + 1}
                    </div>
                    <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">
                      {quizData.timePerQuestion} suggested
                    </span>
                  </div>
                  <div className="text-sm text-gray-500">
                    {currentQuestionIndex + 1} / {quizData.totalQuestions}
                  </div>
                </div>

                <div className="text-lg font-medium text-gray-900 mb-8">
                  {currentQuestion.question}
                </div>

                <div className="space-y-3 mb-8">
                  {currentQuestion.options?.map((option, idx) => (
                    <div
                      key={idx}
                      onClick={() =>
                        !isLoadingNextQuestion && handleOptionSelect(idx)
                      }
                      className={`p-4 rounded-xl border cursor-pointer transition-all ${selectedOption === idx
                        ? "border-blue-500 bg-blue-50"
                        : "border-gray-200 hover:border-gray-300"
                        } ${isLoadingNextQuestion
                          ? "cursor-default"
                          : "hover:bg-gray-50"
                        }`}
                    >
                      <div className="flex items-center">
                        <div
                          className={`w-10 h-10 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center mr-4 ${selectedOption === idx
                            ? "bg-blue-500 text-white"
                            : "bg-gray-100 text-gray-600"
                            }`}
                        >
                          {String.fromCharCode(65 + idx)}
                        </div>
                        <div className="text-gray-800">{option}</div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="text-center py-10 text-gray-500">
                No questions available.
              </div>
            )}
          </div>


          <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-4 justify-between items-center">
            <button
              onClick={handleSkipQuestion}
              disabled={isLoadingNextQuestion}
              className={`w-full sm:w-auto px-6 py-3 rounded-lg font-medium flex items-center justify-center gap-2 ${isLoadingNextQuestion
                ? 'bg-gray-200 text-gray-500 cursor-not-allowed'
                : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-200'
                }`}
            >
              <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M9 5l7 7-7 7" />
              </svg>
              Skip Question
            </button>

            <button
              onClick={handleNextQuestion}
              disabled={isLoadingNextQuestion}
              className={`w-full sm:w-auto px-8 py-3 rounded-lg font-medium ${isLoadingNextQuestion
                ? 'bg-gray-300 text-gray-500 cursor-not-allowed'
                : 'bg-blue-600 text-white hover:bg-blue-700'
                }`}
            >
              {currentQuestionIndex === quizData.questions.length - 1
                ? 'Complete Quiz & See Results'
                : 'Next Question →'}
            </button>
          </div>

          <div className="bg-linear-to-r from-purple-50 to-pink-50 rounded-2xl p-6 border border-purple-200 mt-8">
            <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
              <div className="w-12 h-12 rounded-xl bg-linear-to-r from-purple-500 to-pink-500 flex items-center justify-center">
                <span className="text-xl text-white">🤖</span>
              </div>
              <div>
                <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2">AI-Generated Logical Quiz</h3>
                <p className="text-gray-600 mb-3">
                  This quiz is dynamically generated by AI based on your selected topic and difficulty level.
                </p>
                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 gap-3">
                  <div className="bg-white/70 rounded-lg p-3">
                    <p className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-900">Progress</p>
                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">{currentQuestionIndex + 1}/{quizData.totalQuestions}</p>
                  </div>
                  <div className="bg-white/70 rounded-lg p-3">
                    <p className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-900">Answered</p>
                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">{userAnswers.filter(a => a !== null).length} questions</p>
                  </div>
                  <div className="bg-white/70 rounded-lg p-3">
                    <p className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-900">Skipped</p>
                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">{userAnswers.filter(a => a === null).length} questions</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  /* ---------------- FORM VIEW ---------------- */
  if (view === "form") {
    const selectedTopicObj = topics.find(topic => topic.name === selectedSubject);

    return (
      <div className="p-4 md:p-6 min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-600 mb-6">
          <button
            onClick={() => {
              setView("cards");
              setSelectedSubtopic("");
            }}
            className="hover:text-blue-600 flex items-center gap-1"
          >
            <svg className="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
              <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M10 19l-7-7m0 0l7-7m-7 7h18" />
            </svg>
            Back to Topics
          </button>
          <span>→</span>
          <span className="font-medium text-gray-900">Configure AI Logical Quiz</span>
        </div>

        <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto">
          <div className="bg-linear-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 rounded-2xl p-6 text-white mb-6">
            <h1 className="text-2xl md:text-3xl font-bold mb-2">
              Configure AI Quiz for {selectedSubject}
            </h1>
            <p className="text-blue-100">
              Let our AI generate personalized logical reasoning questions based on your preferences
            </p>
          </div>

          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
            <div className="lg:col-span-2">
              <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 p-6">
                {isGeneratingQuiz ? (
                  <div className="text-center py-12">
                    <div className="inline-block animate-spin rounded-full h-16 w-16 border-4 border-blue-600 border-t-transparent mb-4"></div>
                    <h3 className="text-xl font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2">AI is Generating Your Quiz</h3>
                    <p className="text-gray-600">
                      Creating personalized logical reasoning questions based on your configuration...
                    </p>
                  </div>
                ) : (
                  <>
                    {selectedTopicObj && selectedTopicObj.subtopics.length > 0 && (
                      <div className="mb-6">
                        <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-3">
                          Select Specific Subtopic (Optional)
                        </label>
                        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 gap-3">
                          <div
                            onClick={() => setSelectedSubtopic("")}
                            className={`p-4 rounded-xl border cursor-pointer transition-all ${selectedSubtopic === ""
                              ? "border-blue-500 bg-blue-50"
                              : "border-gray-200 hover:border-gray-300"
                              }`}
                          >
                            <div className="font-medium text-gray-900">All Subtopics</div>
                            <div className="text-sm text-gray-600 mt-1">Comprehensive practice</div>
                          </div>
                          {selectedTopicObj.subtopics.map((subtopic, idx) => (
                            <div
                              key={idx}
                              onClick={() => setSelectedSubtopic(subtopic)}
                              className={`p-4 rounded-xl border cursor-pointer transition-all ${selectedSubtopic === subtopic
                                ? "border-blue-500 bg-blue-50"
                                : "border-gray-200 hover:border-gray-300"
                                }`}
                            >
                              <div className="font-medium text-gray-900">{subtopic}</div>
                              <div className="text-sm text-gray-600 mt-1">Focused practice</div>
                            </div>
                          ))}
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    )}

                    <QuizConfigForm
                      context={{
                        category: "aptitude",
                        subject: "logical",
                        topic: selectedSubject,
                        subtopic: selectedSubtopic,
                      }}
                      onStart={handleStartQuiz}
                    />
                  </>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="space-y-6">
              <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 p-6">
                <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                  <span className="text-blue-600">🧠</span> How AI Logical Quiz Works
                </h3>
                <ul className="space-y-3">
                  <li className="flex items-start gap-3">
                    <div className="w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-blue-100 text-blue-600 flex items-center justify-center text-sm">
                      1
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <p className="font-medium text-gray-900">Configure Preferences</p>
                      <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Set topic, difficulty, and question count</p>
                    </div>
                  </li>
                  <li className="flex items-start gap-3">
                    <div className="w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-blue-100 text-blue-600 flex items-center justify-center text-sm">
                      2
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <p className="font-medium text-gray-900">Take the Quiz</p>
                      <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Answer logical reasoning questions</p>
                    </div>
                  </li>
                  <li className="flex items-start gap-3">
                    <div className="w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-blue-100 text-blue-600 flex items-center justify-center text-sm">
                      3
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <p className="font-medium text-gray-900">View Results</p>
                      <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Get detailed analysis with AI explanations</p>
                    </div>
                  </li>
                </ul>
              </div>

              <div className="bg-linear-to-br from-emerald-50 to-green-50 rounded-2xl p-6 border border-emerald-200">
                <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-emerald-900 mb-3">
                  🎯 Recommended Settings
                </h3>
                <div className="space-y-3">
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                    <span className="text-sm text-emerald-800">Beginners</span>
                    <span className="text-sm font-medium text-emerald-900">5-10 Questions • Easy</span>
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                    <span className="text-sm text-emerald-800">Intermediate</span>
                    <span className="text-sm font-medium text-emerald-900">10-15 Questions • Medium</span>
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                    <span className="text-sm text-emerald-800">Advanced</span>
                    <span className="text-sm font-medium text-emerald-900">15-20 Questions • Hard</span>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="p-4 md:p-6 min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
      <div className="mb-8">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-600 mb-4">
          <Link to="/dashboard" className="hover:text-blue-600">
            Dashboard
          </Link>
          <span>→</span>
          <Link to="/aptitude" className="hover:text-blue-600">
            Aptitude
          </Link>
          <span>→</span>
          <span className="font-medium text-gray-900">Logical Reasoning</span>
        </div>

        <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center justify-between">
          <div>
            <h1 className="text-2xl md:text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900">
              Logical Reasoning
            </h1>
            <p className="text-gray-600 mt-2">
              Develop analytical thinking with AI-generated personalized quizzes
            </p>
          </div>
          <div className="mt-4 md:mt-0">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
              <div className="text-center">
                <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-blue-600">🤖 AI</p>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Powered Quizzes</p>
              </div>
              <div className="text-center">
                <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-green-600"></p>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-600"></p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="mt-6 flex flex-wrap gap-4">
          {difficultyLevels.map((level, index) => (
            <div key={index} className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <div className={`px-3 py-1 rounded-full ${level.color} text-sm font-medium`}>
                {level.level}
              </div>
              <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">{level.topics} topic(s)</span>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>

        <div className="mt-6 bg-blue-50 rounded-xl p-4 border border-blue-200">
          <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
            <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-lg bg-blue-100 flex items-center justify-center shrink-0">
              <span className="text-blue-600">💡</span>
            </div>
            <div>
              <h4 className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-1">Pro Tip</h4>
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                Practice puzzles daily to improve speed. Start with easy ones and gradually increase difficulty.
              </p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 mb-8">
        {topics.map((topic, index) => (
          <div
            key={index}
            onClick={() => {
              setSelectedSubject(topic.name);
              setSelectedSubtopic("");
              setView("form");
            }}
            className="group bg-white rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 p-6 hover:shadow-xl hover:border-blue-300 transition-all duration-300 cursor-pointer"
          >
            <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-4">
              <div className={`w-14 h-14 rounded-xl ${topic.color} flex items-center justify-center`}>
                <span className="text-2xl">{topic.icon}</span>
              </div>
              <div className="text-right">
                <span className={`text-xs px-3 py-1 rounded-full ${topic.difficulty === "Easy" ? "bg-green-100 text-green-800" :
                  topic.difficulty === "Medium" ? "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800" :
                    "bg-red-100 text-red-800"
                  }`}>
                  {topic.difficulty}
                </span>
                <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">{topic.timePerQuestion}</p>
              </div>
            </div>

            <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2 group-hover:text-blue-600">
              {topic.name}
            </h3>

            <div className="mb-4">
              <div className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-3">
                {topic.questions} questions
              </div>

              <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                {topic.subtopics.slice(0, 3).map((subtopic, idx) => (
                  <span key={idx} className="text-xs px-2 py-1 bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 rounded">
                    {subtopic}
                  </span>
                ))}
                {topic.subtopics.length > 3 && (
                  <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">
                    +{topic.subtopics.length - 3} more
                  </span>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="flex items-center justify-between pt-4 border-t border-gray-100">
              <span className="text-sm font-medium text-blue-600">
                Start AI Quiz →
              </span>
              <div className="text-xs text-gray-500">AI-generated</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>

      <div className="bg-linear-to-r from-purple-600 to-indigo-600 rounded-2xl p-6 mb-8 text-white">
        <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row items-center justify-between">
          <div className="mb-4 md:mb-0">
            <h3 className="text-xl font-bold mb-2">🤖 Try AI-Powered Logical Quiz</h3>
            <p className="text-purple-100">
              Get detailed results with AI explanations after completing logical reasoning quizzes
            </p>
          </div>
          <button
            onClick={() => {
              setSelectedSubject("Puzzles");
              setSelectedSubtopic("");
              setView("form");
            }}
            className="bg-white text-purple-600 px-6 py-3 rounded-xl font-bold hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors"
          >
            Start Adaptive Quiz
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <Link
          to="/aptitude"
          className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 text-gray-700 bg-gray-100 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-200 transition-colors"
        >
          <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
            <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M10 19l-7-7m0 0l7-7m-7 7h18" />
          </svg>
          Back to Aptitude
        </Link>

        <div className="flex gap-4">
          <Link
            to="/aptitude/quantitative"
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 text-gray-600 bg-gray-100 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-200 transition-colors"
          >
            <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
              <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M10 19l-7-7m0 0l7-7m-7 7h18" />
            </svg>
            Previous: Quantitative
          </Link>

          <Link
            to="/aptitude/verbal"
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 text-blue-600 bg-blue-50 rounded-lg hover:bg-blue-100 transition-colors"
          >
            Next: Verbal Ability
            <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
              <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M13 7l5 5m0 0l-5 5m5-5H6" />
            </svg>
          </Link>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
